svg.metadata: {"_description":"OAuth 2.0 authorization-code flow (RFC 6749 §4.1). The canonical web-app sign-in handshake.","type":"sequence","title":"OAuth 2.0 authorization code","actors":[{"id":"user","label":"User"},{"id":"app","label":"Client App"},{"id":"auth","label":"Auth Server","accent":"accent"},{"id":"rs","label":"Resource\nServer"}],"messages":[{"from":"user","to":"app","label":"click 'sign in'"},{"from":"app","to":"auth","label":"GET /authorize"},{"from":"auth","to":"user","label":"login + consent"},{"from":"user","to":"auth","label":"approve"},{"from":"auth","to":"app","label":"redirect ?code=…","kind":"return"},{"from":"app","to":"auth","label":"POST /token (code)"},{"from":"auth","to":"app","label":"access_token","kind":"return"},{"from":"app","to":"rs","label":"GET /resource\n(Bearer token)"},{"from":"rs","to":"app","label":"resource","kind":"return"}]}
